query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS escalas_eventos (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  equipeId INT NOT NULL,
  userId VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  titulo VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  descricao TEXT,
  data DATE NOT NULL,
  hora VARCHAR(10),
  local VARCHAR(255),
  tipo VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('ativo', 'cancelado', 'concluido', 'arquivado') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ativo',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (equipeId) REFERENCES equipes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS escalas_participantes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  escalaId INT NOT NULL,
  membroId INT NOT NULL,
  funcao VARCHAR(100),
  status ENUM('pendente', 'confirmado', 'recusado') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  observacoes TEXT,
  confirmedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (escalaId) REFERENCES escalas_eventos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (membroId) REFERENCES membros(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (equipeId) REFERENCES equipes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS escalas_participantes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  escalaId INT NOT NULL,
